_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AU Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AU Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after AU Stage B precision guards

Indicative Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Bright Quarry Energy Ltd by Harbour Finch Pty Ltd (Australia).
Structure: off-market takeover bid under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth), subject to compliance with ASIC requirements and ASX Listing Rules where applicable.

Costs and break fee: each party bears its own costs; any break fee to be modest and within prevailing takeovers guidance; internal drafts may display invalid reference tags (e.g., REF-0000-XX) with no legal effect.

uncertain.reason: Device tag may function as a device serial number, but it is not explicitly labeled as a serial number.
BSB is a bank routing code; inclusion under bank_account may be debatable.
Masked digits may still constitute a bank account identifier; partial/obfuscated nature makes classification uncertain.
Indicates use of a clean room; mapping to information_barrier_marker may depend on detector vocabulary.
Signals disclosure constraints; could be treated as selective disclosure risk or general compliance language.
Heading declares absence of MNPI; detectors may not flag headings or may require the 'not generally available' wording.
